title: Runtime Platform

# Runtime Platform
Runtime platform coordinates queue routing, worker lanes, and operational dispatch.
[Source: User, direct message, 2026-06-01 09:00 KST]

## Queue Routing
Queue routing assigns ingestion work to worker lanes with bounded retries.

pages.title: Queue Routing
pages.content:
---
type: concept
title: Queue Routing
---
# Queue Routing
Queue routing chooses a worker lane for each durable ingestion task.
[Source: User, direct message, 2026-06-01 09:05 KST]

## Retry Discipline
Retry discipline keeps failed queue jobs bounded and observable.

pages.title: Source Aware Retrieval
pages.content:
---
type: system
title: Source Aware Retrieval
---
# Source Aware Retrieval
Source aware retrieval ranks canonical slugs, then requires read_context before factual claims.
[Source: User, direct message, 2026-06-01 09:10 KST]

## Qrels Gate
The qrels gate evaluates candidates by canonical slug instead of raw snippets.
